source_ranges.label: Pan butter
source_ranges.reason: Quickly establish a greased warm pan before batter is added.

source_ranges.label: Pour and set
source_ranges.reason: Shows ladling batter, spread, bubble formation, and the visual doneness cue.

source_ranges.label: Flip and finish second side
source_ranges.reason: Keeps the overhead flip and browning action while avoiding face-only inserts.

source_ranges.label: Plate and syrup
source_ranges.reason: Delivers plated result with butter and syrup for a complete social tutorial ending.

operations.reason: Extract only the expert chef demonstration and omit the novice montage, banter, and end card.
Maintain a true vertical frame while keeping pan, pancake, hands, spatula, and plated result centered.

parameters.style: top-centered bold white text with translucent dark box

operations.reason: Turn the cooking sequence into a clear step-by-step standalone tutorial.
Preserve useful original audio while normalizing loudness and keeping peaks below clipping.

crop_decisions.crop: 720x1280 at centered x=778, y=0 after scaling
crop_decisions.reason: The chef demo is consistently staged around the center of frame, so one center crop preserves the tutorial action without pillarbox or blurred padding.

captions.text: Step 1: Melt butter in a warm pan
Step 2: Ladle batter into the center
Step 4: Flip when edges look set

audio_adjustments.reason: Keep speech and cooking sound usable without clipping.

checks_performed: ffmpeg -v info -i submit/output.mp4 -vf freezedetect=n=-60dB:d=2 -an -f null - 2>&1 | grep freezedetect || true
sampled output frames every 10 seconds and reviewed work/final_contact.jpg
python OpenCV pass to count dark frames and estimate sampled frame-to-frame differences
